parameters.name: decoding_status
parameters.description:
Result of ABI-based XDR decoding

* `success` - Success
* `failed` - Failed
* `no_abi` - No ABI

parameters.name: ordering
parameters.description: Which field to use when ordering the results.

parameters.name: payload_op
parameters.description:
* `eq` - eq
* `neq` - neq
* `gte` - gte
* `lte` - lte
* `gt` - gt
* `lt` - lt
* `contains` - contains
* `startswith` - startswith
* `in` - in

parameters.name: signature_status
parameters.description:
Result of event signature verification

* `valid` - Valid
* `invalid` - Invalid
* `missing` - Missing

parameters.name: validation_status
parameters.description:
Result of schema validation

* `passed` - Passed
* `failed` - Failed
